message:
Use admission_now() for cancel_entry timestamp instead of zero sentinel

The previous fix (02c94cfe) restored the missing Time argument but passed
Time::from_nanos(0), which causes the bulkhead's wait-time metrics
(wait_ms, max_queue_wait_ms) to always report 0 because the calculation
is now.as_millis().saturating_sub(enqueued_at_millis). Using
admission_now() provides a real wall-clock timestamp so cancellation
wait-time tracking is accurate.

Fixes #38, fixes #40.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
